description: A general purpose language agent capable of handling a wide range of natural language tasks including reasoning, summarization, question answering, code generation, debugging, email writing, and planning. Built on a large parameter transformer model, this agent is designed to serve as a flexible baseline for tasks that do not require domain-specific specialization.
use_cases: Breaking down complex tasks into step-by-step plans
limitations: No internet access or real-time data
May hallucinate facts in niche domains
Text only — no image, audio, or video input

capabilities.description: Generates and debugs code based on natural language descriptions.
capabilities.input_example: Here is a Python function that is supposed to return the sum of a list but it returns None. Fix it.
capabilities.output_example: A corrected Python function with an explanation of the bug and what was changed.
capabilities.constraints: Cannot execute or verify code at runtime. Generated code should be reviewed before use.

capabilities.description: Drafts professional emails based on context, tone, and recipient details.
capabilities.input_example: Write a professional email to a client informing them of a project delay.
capabilities.output_example: A complete, grammatically correct email with subject line, body, and closing.
capabilities.constraints: No access to user contacts or email history. Tone and content based on prompt only.

capabilities.description: Performs multi-step logical reasoning over a given problem or question.
capabilities.input_example: If all A are B and all B are C, are all A also C? Explain.
capabilities.output_example: A step-by-step logical breakdown arriving at the correct conclusion.
capabilities.constraints: Works best on well-defined problems. May struggle with ambiguous premises.

capabilities.description: Breaks down high-level goals into ordered, actionable step-by-step plans.
capabilities.input_example: I want to launch a personal portfolio website in 2 weeks. What should I do?
capabilities.output_example: A numbered plan covering design, development, deployment, and launch with time estimates.
capabilities.constraints: Plans are based on general knowledge and may not account for user-specific constraints.

capabilities.description: Condenses long-form text into concise summaries preserving key points.
capabilities.output_example: A 150-200 word summary covering the main contribution, methodology, and conclusions.
capabilities.constraints: Input must fit within context window. Quality may degrade on highly technical content.

network.notes: Outbound only to local vllm instance on port 8000.

logging.notes: Request and response logged per invocation. No user data retained.

tests.name: smoke_test_code_generation
tests.description: POST /invoke with a buggy Python function and verify a corrected version is returned.

tests.name: smoke_test_email_writing
tests.description: POST /invoke with an email drafting request and verify a complete email is returned.

tests.name: smoke_test_planning
tests.description: POST /invoke with a planning request and verify a numbered step-by-step plan is returned.
